vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #1147

plan.title: task slice:record-existing -- retrofit slice records for hand-filed cohorts (N7 of #1119)

narratives.Description: task slice:record-existing -- retrofit slice records for hand-filed cohorts (N7 of #1119)
narratives.Overview: Implement `task slice:record-existing` verb (and optional `task slice:list`) that writes a backfill entry to vbrief/.eval/slices.jsonl for hand-filed umbrella cohorts. D13 writes slices.jsonl only when slicing skills fire; this verb closes the gap for cohorts authored via gh issue create / issue_write (e.g. #1119 itself). Validation uses scm.call("github-issue", ...) per N5 (#1145) which has landed. Acceptance covers happy path, dry-run, idempotency, --force, missing umbrella, missing child, wave assignment, multi-wave; documents canonical retro path in deft-directive-refinement and deft-directive-gh-slice SKILL.md files.

references.title: Issue #1147: task slice:record-existing -- retrofit slice records for hand-filed cohorts
